scripts.dev: node -e "const { spawn } = require('node:child_process'); const port = process.env.PORT || '3000'; const child = spawn('next', ['dev', '-p', port, '-H', '0.0.0.0'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); child.on('exit', (code) => process.exit(code ?? 0));"
scripts.start: node -e "const { spawn } = require('node:child_process'); const port = process.env.PORT || '3000'; const child = spawn('next', ['start', '-p', port, '-H', '0.0.0.0'], { stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }); child.on('exit', (code) => process.exit(code ?? 0));"
